2604.07116.title: Yale-DM-Lab at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Deterministic Grounding and Multi-Pass Evidence Alignment for EHR Question Answering
2604.07116.paper_summary: We describe the Yale-DM-Lab system for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task. The task studies patient-authored questions about hospitalization records and contains four subtasks (ST): clinician-interpreted question reformulation, evidence sentence identification, answer generation, and evidence-answer alignment. ST1 uses a dual-model pipeline with Claude Sonnet 4 and GPT-4o to reformulate patient questions into clinician-interpreted questions. ST2-ST4 rely on Azure-hosted model ensembles (o3, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.1, and DeepSeek-R1) combined with few-shot prompting and voting strategies. Our experiments show three main findings. First, model diversity and ensemble voting consistently improve performance compared to single-model baselines. Second, the full clinician answer paragraph is provided as additional prompt context for evidence alignment. Third, results on the development set show that alignment accuracy is mainly limited by reasoning. The best scores on the development set reach 88.81 micro F1 on ST4, 65.72 macro F1 on ST2, 34.01 on ST3, and 33.05 on ST1.
2604.07116.paper_summary_zh: 我們描述了Yale-DM-Lab系統在ArchEHR-QA 2026共享任務中的應用。該任務研究患者撰寫的有關住院記錄的問題，並包含四個子任務（ST）：臨床醫生解釋的問題重述、證據句子識別、答案生成和證據-答案對齊。ST1使用Claude Sonnet 4和GPT-4o的雙模型管道將患者問題重述為臨床醫生解釋的問題。ST2-ST4依賴於Azure託管的模型集成（o3、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.1和DeepSeek-R1），並結合少量示例提示和投票策略。我們的實驗顯示了三個主要發現。首先，模型多樣性和集成投票始終比單模型基準提高性能。其次，完整的臨床答案段落作為額外的提示上下文提供，以便進行證據對齊。第三，開發集的結果顯示，對齊準確性主要受到推理的限制。開發集的最佳得分在ST4上達到88.81微F1，在ST2上達到65.72宏F1，在ST3上達到34.01，在ST1上達到33.05。
2604.07116.author: Elyas Irankhah et.al.
